title: Cold sweat addon: Hardcore crops
description: Mod/Data pack dedicated to adding crop temps for cold sweat limitations.
body:
Hardcore crops adds tempatures for varous crops from different mods to make them compatible with Cold Sweat Limitations. All credit goes to the creators of [Cold sweat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cold-sweat) and [Cold Sweat Limitations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cold-sweat-limitations-crops/relations/dependencies).

**Jade does not currently display the correct crop tempatures!**


## Currently supported crops

- Vanilla
- Farmers delight
- Fruits delight
- Corn delight
- Vintage delight
- Rustic delight

## Dependencies

- [Cold sweat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cold-sweat)
- [Cold sweat limitations: crops](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cold-sweat-limitations-crops)
